{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220521381FD26F8EB7E01A114C55"}"},"total":1183},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7477028501794358041","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看 很符合我的口味  很好看的爽文  文中有许多疑点比如男主的身世之类的  男主的性格我也很喜欢  冷漠却也有人情味 感觉和丧尸皇挺好磕的[思考]  不过这是我个人的想法  总而言之这本书还是超好看的[雀食神作]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740886730,"group_id":"7327218508293475390","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"年下骨科谁最强 一屋暗灯王中王😎😎","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5faApxMVXph0FQ9qK3N/Rw=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/013fa29761c54df89502ae4260ac6b4d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710231&x-signature=EOixzIt8o3n32U0NWY9nH5pV58c%3D","user_id":"13654418533688","user_name":"倷曦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"13654418533688","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7327218508293475390","book_info":{"abstract":"丧尸，极寒，极热，地震，酸雨……
超市内完全无敌。
宇宙万界。
一开始系统就赋予全系异能，但只是起点，后面升级速度快，实力轻松碾压，就算外星高等文明也是渣渣。
当别人为了吃的拼出性命，血流成河时，男主坐拥一座超市。
当女人为了食物甘愿委身时，男主坐怀不乱，甚至觉得反感。
总有些不长眼的，那就直接杀了！
各基地：“要和超市老板搞好关系！”
丧尸皇：“要和超市老板成为朋友！”
对于外星文明，官方：“只有超市老板能帮我们了！”
超市九层，越往高层，所卖的东西更是就连外星高等文明种族也震惊当场。
本故事纯属虚构！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/174c040dc4e01311854c2e198fcd3465","author":"亿千秋","author_id":"","book_id":"7327218508293475390","book_name":"末世重生，获无敌超市系统","book_short_name":"末世无敌超市","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7327245054504862270","read_count":"11839","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1187584"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"584","tags":"科幻末世,系统,重生,末世,求生,无敌,无女主,末日求生,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e44326a9942ad7606b2c2fc97525c599~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312099&x-signature=1kLMVfdWm1Jge5w1Ix8QbQ34dSA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_li
